title: Bemix Discovery Catering
description:
We regularly welcome social enterprise Bemix Discovery Catering and their wonderful group, those with and without learning difficulties.

Tuesdays, 10am – 4pm

At Westgate Hall community venue, they enjoy time together gaining skills in cooking and catering. The group are supported to develop and prepare recipes, learn about healthy eating, gain skills in using kitchen equipment, work towards qualifications in hospitality and catering and be supported to work at catering bookings and local events.

During Covid-19 restrictions, the group still came together, at a social distance in our Covid-secure venue, to plan recipes for when they can get cooking again and host their regular pop-up cafe at the Hall.

Bemix supports adults with learning difficulties to speak up and make choices that are right for them. Specifically, Bemix supports people to become more independent in learning, housing, work, health, money, travel, hobbies / activities and relationships.

Contact Karen Franczak at karen.franczak@bemix.org  or call 01227 374285.

title: Salsa-Asi weekly classes
description:
Set those hips in motion with Salsa-Asi! as Westgate Hall transforms into a dancefloor for the return of this weekly class.

Come solo, with a friend or dance partner to learn salsa from scratch or get even better. Beginners, Improvers and Intermediate classes. No need to book, just turn up.

Weekly on Thursdays.

Doors open from 7:30pm

First class bonus starts 8pm

Classes from 8:30pm, freestyle until 11 pm

For more information call Massimo on 07568485936, visit www.salsaasi.co.uk or email info@salsa-asi.co.uk

Find out more about Bemix Discovery Catering

Contact Karen Franczak at karen.franczak@bemix.org  or call 01227 374285.

Supporting our community is at the core of what we do and stand for

We provide a trusted, neutral space for people to come together and thrive. Find out how we can support your community venue >

title: Bemix Discovery Catering Pop-up Cafe
description:
Enjoy delicious food and drink from Bemix Discovery Catering and their wonderful group – those with and without learning difficulties – at their pop-up cafe from 12 – 2pm.

The group come together every week at Westgate Hall’s community venue to learn skills in cooking and catering. They are supported to develop and prepare recipes, learn about healthy eating, gain skills in using kitchen equipment, work towards qualifications in hospitality and catering, and be supported to work at catering bookings and local events. This is your chance to sample what they’ve been making whilst supporting the social enterprise at the same time.

Bemix supports adults with learning difficulties to speak up and make choices that are right for them. Specifically, Bemix supports people to become more independent in learning, housing, work, health, money, travel, hobbies/activities and relationships.

Contact Karen Franczak at karen.franczak@bemix.org  or call 01227 374285.

Supporting our community is at the core of what we do and stand for.

title: Westgate Hall Market
description:
Discover talented Kent makers, artists, craftspeople and producers at Westgate Hall’s popular Market in Canterbury city centre.

Find dozens of stalls and hundreds of locally-made products, all under one roof. We bring you the best Kent produce, crafts, homewares, jewellery and more, for you to browse and buy, supporting local businesses with every purchase.

The Market is hosted in partnership with C&C Markets, a consortium of Kent makers.

10:30am-4pm

Free entry

title: Blood donation session
description:
Give the gift of life… join a Blood Donation Session in 2026 at Westgate Hall.

For more details and to book an appointment visit blood.co.uk / download the app NHSGIVEBLOOD / call 0300 123 23 23

We’re here for you at this time – if you are looking for a safe, trusted venue to hold your health event, get in touch.
